name: @openburo/application-manifest-codegen
description: Generates typed models from application-manifest.schema.json using quicktype.

scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:ts && pnpm run generate:python && pnpm run generate:php && pnpm run generate:java
scripts.generate:ts: mkdir -p generated/typescript && quicktype --src-lang schema --src ../application-manifest.schema.json --lang typescript --top-level Application --out generated/typescript/application-manifest.ts
scripts.generate:python: mkdir -p generated/python && quicktype --src-lang schema --src ../application-manifest.schema.json --lang python --python-version 3.7 --top-level Application --out generated/python/application_manifest.py
scripts.generate:php: mkdir -p generated/php && jq '.["$defs"].application.properties.name = {"description": .["$defs"].application.properties.name.description}' ../application-manifest.schema.json | quicktype --src-lang schema --lang php --top-level Application --out generated/php/Application.php
scripts.generate:java: mkdir -p generated/java/eu/openburo/manifest && quicktype --src-lang schema --src ../application-manifest.schema.json --lang java --package eu.openburo.manifest --top-level Application --out generated/java/eu/openburo/manifest/Application.java
